reach_why: Applies broadly to continual learning, compression, abstraction, and forgetting, but relies on obscure invented primitives.
novelty_why: Inverts replay orthodoxy: forgetting and extreme compression become the mechanism of transfer and retention.
falsifiable_why: Buffer-size and compression claims are testable, but invented fundamentals are underspecified and metaphorical.
explanation: Forgetting may improve continual learning by compressing past tasks into transferable abstractions.
